title: Olivrr's Minecraft
description: Quality of Life modpack, updated fairly often
body:
# Minecraft, but in my way!
## Let me tell you why I made this modpack:
I use this as my day to day client. I play on my SMP (Which you could join by joining the discord btw), I play bedwars, singleplayer etc.

One day one of my friends wanted to play Minecraft and I gave him this modpack. He liked it, then more of my friends wanted it. They insisted that I make it public (After I asked them :)) so yeah I did. 

## Content
This modpack has all you need for an immersive Minecraft gameplay. If you see a mod missing just contact me on discord and I'll add it (If it fits the modpack ofc)
